items.title: Solana eyes $117 – But here’s why SOL bulls still look fragile
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite a target of $117, SOL bulls are showing weakness, indicating potential volatility and uncertainty in market sentiment.

items.title: Solana’s Builder Debate: What the Foundation Says It Offers
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Solana Foundation's offerings are under scrutiny, which could impact developer confidence and the ecosystem's growth trajectory.

items.title: $2.13 billion in Solana trades, yet retail interest fails to show up – Why?
items.whyYouShouldCare: With $2.13 billion in trades but low retail interest, Solana's liquidity dynamics may signal underlying issues in attracting broader market participation.
